productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids-Boys Green Digital Pop Watch
description: Carry cute little Raju along wherever you go with this colourful digital wrist watch from chhota bheem. Made of soft and flexible plastic straps and colourful embossed prints, this watch is a perfect gift to make your little one squeal in delight. Case diameter: 30 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Wrist watch with flexible plastic straps for abrasion free comfort Tang clasp to customise the Fit Embossed image of Raju, his name and flowers on the straps for style Digital display of time, date, seconds and has a stop watch Buttons on the front to set time, date and stopwatch
